scripts.deploy: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run deploy" "cd backend && npm run deploy"
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run lint" "cd backend && npm run lint"
scripts.lint:fix: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run lint:fix" "cd backend && npm run lint:fix"
scripts.format: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run format" "cd backend && npm run format"
scripts.format:check: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run format:check" "cd backend && npm run format:check"
